name: spark-store-v2-contract

canonicalStores.notes: Task and session TODO rows are stored here after cutover; this is not a cache.
Per-session state, goal, loop, TODO display metadata, hidden role-run inbox, and subject-owned goal reviews.
Project, roadmap, dependencies, tasks, task runs, and subject-owned task/project reviews.
Artifact metadata and blobs remain separate; owners store artifact refs only.

doctorRules: dry-run reports V1 sources, V2 targets, conflicts, and cutover readiness
migration creates backup, imports once, rebuilds indexes, validates invariants, and records cutover marker
runtime after cutover fails with migration_required or cutover_incomplete instead of falling back to V1
runtime must not dual-write V1 and V2 stores
